name: Old-Style Wheat Biscuits
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Lite salt or less or none
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 475°F. Sift together flours, baking powder, lite salt and baking soda. Cut in oil until mixture looks like coarse corn meal. In a separate bowl, combine vinegar and milk. Stir into the flour mixture until a soft dough forms. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead gently. Roll out dough to 1 inch thickness. Cut with a biscuit cutter or glass. Place on a baking sheet. Bake for about 12 minutes. Makes 16 biscuits.
